cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what the author did when he met Mr. Lee. The answer choices are A to D. Looking back at the passage: The author was with his mother, and she stopped to speak to Mr. Lee. The author says he knew he could see Mr. Lee anytime around the neighborhood, so he didn't pay any attention to him. That implies that he didn't talk to Mr. Lee or greet him. After passing Mr. Lee, the mother scolded the author for not saying hello. So the author didn't greet Mr. Lee at that time. The answer would be D, He ignored him. The other choices don't fit.
